englishDefinitions: enjoyed using, playing with, or experimenting with something
treated something in a playful or creative way
persianTranslation: به‌صورت خلاقانه و سرگرم‌کننده با چیزی کار کردن
examples: The children had fun with the new building blocks.
The designer had fun with bright colors in the poster.
We had fun with the idea during the workshop.
